title: Sportradar Competitor
description: Schema for a Sportradar competitor entity representing a sports team or individual player. Competitors are identified by Sportradar URNs and can represent teams in team sports or individual athletes in individual sports.

id.description: Unique Sportradar URN for the competitor in the format sr:competitor:{id} or sr:team:{id}.

name.description: Full official name of the team or player.

abbreviation.description: Standard abbreviation for the competitor, typically 2-4 characters.

short_name.description: Short form of the competitor name for display in space-constrained contexts.

country.description: Country the competitor represents or is based in.

country_code.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 or alpha-3 country code.

gender.description: Gender classification of the team or player.

type.description: Competitor type: team for team sports, player for individual sports.

category.description: Organizational category the competitor belongs to.

sport.description: The sport this competitor participates in.

players.description: List of players on the team roster (for team competitors).

Player.title: Player
Player.description: An individual player within a sports team or competing as an individual.

position.description: Player's position (sport-specific, e.g., G, F, C for basketball; FW, MF, DF, GK for soccer).

starter.description: Whether the player is in the starting lineup.
